allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const c=fs.readFileSync\('src/pages/POSPage.jsx','utf8'\); const line712=c.split\('\\n'\)[711]; console.log\('Line 712 length:', line712.length\); console.log\('Chars 140-150:', JSON.stringify\(line712.slice\(139,149\)\)\); const opens=line712.split\(''\).filter\(ch=>ch==='\('\).length; const closes=line712.split\(''\).filter\(ch=>ch==='\)'\).length; console.log\('Opens:',opens,'Closes:',closes\);")
